action.reasoning: Observation: exit code 139 (SIGSEGV/OOM) with empty stdout after 502s. Analysis: The compute_pos_weight function looped through 350K graphs × 128 tasks in Python (~45M iterations), likely causing extremely slow execution and eventual OOM/timeout. Also, pre-creating 350K Data objects wastes memory. Decision: Vectorize pos_weight using torch.stack, use lazy MolDataset class, add flush prints and PYTHONUNBUFFERED for debugging, reduce num_workers to 2 for stability.
